sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَتْ سَارَةُ افْتِتَاحَ مَطْعَمٍ صَغِيرٍ لِلْأَكْلِ الصِّحِّيِّ.
sentences.translation: Sara je odlučila otvoriti mali restoran zdrave hrane.
sentences.translationEn: Sara decided to open a small healthy food restaurant.

sentences.arabic: دَرَسَتْ حَاجَةَ السُّوقِ وَبَحَثَتْ عَنْ مَوْقِعٍ مُمَيَّزٍ لِمَشْرُوعِهَا.
sentences.translation: Istražila je potrebe tržišta i potražila posebnu lokaciju za svoj projekat.
sentences.translationEn: She studied the market needs and searched for a unique location for her project.

sentences.arabic: تَعْمَلُ الْآنَ بِجِدٍّ لِتَطْوِيرِ قَائِمَةِ الطَّعَامِ الْخَاصَّةِ بِهَا.
sentences.translation: Sada naporno radi na razvoju svog jelovnika.
sentences.translationEn: She is now working hard to develop her own menu.
